title: The Coded Pizza Order
description: A domestic violence victim calls 911 under duress, pretending to order a pizza while secretly signaling for help. The dispatcher must decode the subtle clues.
initial_variations: Hi, I'd like to place an order for a large pepperoni pizza at {address_location}.
Can I get a pizza delivered to {address_location}? Make it a large with extra cheese, please.
I need to order a pizza for {address_location}. Uh, large, pepperoni and mushrooms.
Delivery please, to {address_location}. Large pizza, half pepperoni, half plain.

code_negotiation: I told you, {address_location}. Just a pizza!
escalated: I already gave you {address_location}! Why aren't you sending someone?
secured: Thank you, yes, {address_location}. The police are here.

initial: I said large pepperoni. Is there a problem?
Extra cheese, large. That's the order.
code_negotiation: Large pepperoni means I need help now!
Extra cheese is code for my abuser is here.
Mushrooms mean there are children in the house.
escalated: He's getting angry! Large pepperoni! Now!
secured: The code worked. Thank you.

initial: My name? It's {caller_name}. For the pizza.
Just {caller_name}. Can you take my order?
code_negotiation: It's {caller_name}. Please, just send the pizza.
secured: {caller_name}. I'm safe now.

initial: What specifics? A large pizza. That's all.
I don't understand, just a pizza.
code_negotiation: Large pepperoni is the code for danger. Extra cheese means abuser present.
Mushrooms mean children. Half plain means weapon.
The toppings are the message. Please understand.
escalated: He's got a knife! Large pepperoni! Now!
Extra cheese! He's coming! Code red!
secured: The code was understood. Thank you for saving us.

initial: Just a pizza order. Why are you asking?
Is this a prank? I need a pizza.
Please, I'm busy. Just take the order.
code_negotiation: Something's wrong. I'm in danger. Please send police.
I can't talk freely. He's here. Help via code.
The pizza order is a cover. I need help.
escalated: He's violent! I need police now! The code was real!
He's hitting me! Send help! The pizza was a lie!
secured: I'm safe now. Thank you for understanding the code.

SEND_POLICE.feedback: You correctly identified the coded call and dispatched police. The caller and children were rescued from the abuser.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Sending fire trucks was a mistake. There was no fire, and the noise may have escalated the situation. Police were needed.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Medical dispatch was not immediately necessary. The caller needed police protection. However, medical could have been called later if injuries were present.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Sending animal control was completely inappropriate. The caller was in mortal danger, and the delay could have been fatal.

DISMISS.feedback: Dismissing the call as a prank or wrong number was a critical error. The caller was a victim of domestic violence and needed immediate police intervention.

title: The Nursery Rhyme Distress
description: A child calls 911 and begins reciting a nursery rhyme that contains a hidden plea for help, while parents argue violently in the background.
initial_variations: Hello? Twinkle twinkle little star, how I wonder where you are, up above the world so high, like a diamond in the sky.
Is this 911? Humpty Dumpty sat on a wall, Humpty Dumpty had a great fall. All the king's horses and all the king's men couldn't put Humpty together again.
Hi, I'm at {address_location}. Mary had a little lamb, its fleece was white as snow, and everywhere that Mary went, the lamb was sure to go.
Please, I need help. Jack and Jill went up the hill to fetch a pail of water. Jack fell down and broke his crown, and Jill came tumbling after.

specific_details: humpty dumpty means father is hurting mother
mary had a little lamb means mother is hurt
jack and jill means both parents are fighting

questioning: {address_location}. Please send someone. The rhyme says it all.
It's {address_location}. The nursery rhyme is the clue.
safe: Thank you. I'm at {address_location}. The police are here now.

initial: I'm just reciting a rhyme. Twinkle twinkle.
Mary had a little lamb, that's what I said.
questioning: Twinkle twinkle means I need help. My parents are fighting.
Humpty Dumpty means my dad is hurting my mom.
Mary had a little lamb means my mom is hurt.
confrontation: He's hitting her! The rhyme is real! Humpty Dumpty!
They're both fighting! Jack and Jill! Help!
safe: The rhyme worked. Thank you for understanding.

questioning: It's {caller_name}. Please, the rhyme is a cry for help.
safe: {caller_name}. I'm safe. Thank you.

questioning: Twinkle twinkle means danger. Humpty Dumpty means abuse.
The rhymes are code. Please send police.
Mary had a little lamb means mother needs help.
confrontation: They are going to kill each other! The rhymes are not just rhymes!
Jack and Jill is a fight! They are bleeding!
safe: The code was the rhyme. Thank you for listening.

initial: I'm just a kid reciting a poem.
Is this a game? I'm reciting a rhyme.
I don't know what you mean.
questioning: I'm in danger. My parents are fighting. The rhyme is a code.
Please understand. The rhyme means I need help.
confrontation: It's a domestic violence situation. They are violent! Send police!
The nursery rhyme is a distress signal. Immediate help needed!
safe: I am safe now. The code worked. Thank you.

SEND_POLICE.feedback: You correctly interpreted the child's coded nursery rhyme and dispatched police. Officers intervened in a domestic violence incident and rescued the child and injured parent.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Sending fire was inappropriate. There was no fire, and the delay in sending police could have escalated the danger.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Medical dispatch alone was insufficient. While injuries may be present, police were needed first to secure the scene. Medical could be requested after.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Sending animal control was a critical mistake. The call was a child seeking help during a violent domestic dispute.

DISMISS.feedback: Dismissing the call as a prank was a fatal error. The child was in grave danger, and failure to respond led to serious harm.

title: The Book Club Meeting
description: A caller pretends to discuss a book club meeting, but uses coded language to indicate a hostage situation. Background sounds of muffled voices and a TV.

states.initial: Caller is speaking in code, pretending to discuss book club details.
states.probing: Caller is trying to convey the severity without alerting the perpetrator.
states.escalating: Perpetrator becomes suspicious, caller's tone becomes more frantic.
states.secured: Perpetrator is distracted or leaves, caller can speak freely.

initial_variations: Hi, I need to reschedule the book club meeting for {caller_name}. We were thinking of {address_location} instead, but the agenda has changed.
Yes, I'm calling about the book club. The meeting at {address_location} might need to be moved because the host has a {specific_details} situation.
Hello, I wanted to discuss the next book for our club. Actually, can you tell me if {victim_relation} is available? There's a {ambient_audio} issue at {address_location}.
Oh, good, you picked up. I'm at {address_location} for the book club, but there's an unexpected {specific_details}. The door is locked and I hear {ambient_audio}.

initial: We're at {address_location}. Can you confirm the meeting time?
The location is {address_location}. There's been a change of plans.
I'm at {address_location}. The host has a {specific_details} to discuss.
probing: It's still {address_location}. Please hurry, the {ambient_audio} is getting louder.
Same place: {address_location}. I think {victim_relation} needs help.
escalating: I told you, {address_location}! Someone is {ambient_audio}. Just send help!
At {address_location}! The {specific_details} is becoming dangerous.
secured: Thank you, we're at {address_location}. The perpetrator left. Send police now.

initial: We're discussing a book about {specific_details}. It's quite intense.
The plot involves {victim_relation} and a {ambient_audio} climax.
The main character is dealing with a {specific_details} at {address_location}.
probing: It's not about a book. There's a {specific_details} situation here. {victim_relation} is in danger.
The meeting is a cover. There's a {ambient_audio} and someone is threatening {victim_relation}.
escalating: He has a weapon! The {specific_details} is a hostage crisis. Please send police!
The {ambient_audio} is the sound of a struggle. {victim_relation} needs immediate help.
secured: It's over. The perpetrator is gone. We need police and medical at {address_location}.

initial: I'm calling for {caller_name}. They're the host.
This is {caller_name}. I'm at the meeting.
My name is {caller_name}, but I'm just a member.
probing: It's {caller_name}. I'm the one who called. Please understand.
escalating: This is {caller_name}. Just send police now!
Call me {caller_name}. I'm in danger.
secured: I'm {caller_name}. Thank you for helping.

initial: {victim_relation} is the one who might need assistance.
probing: {victim_relation} is being held against their will.
{victim_relation} is in trouble. The {ambient_audio} is from them.
Please help {victim_relation}. They are the victim.
escalating: They're hurting {victim_relation}! Hurry!
{victim_relation} is the hostage! Send SWAT!
secured: The hostage is {victim_relation}. They're safe now.

initial: The book discusses a weapon, but it's fictional.
There's talk of a {specific_details} but it's all metaphors.
No weapons mentioned in the story.
probing: There might be a weapon. The {ambient_audio} could be a knife.
I think he has a gun. Be careful.
escalating: He has a knife! He's threatening {victim_relation}!
Gun! He has a gun! Send armed units!
secured: The weapon is secured. Perpetrator disarmed.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived and apprehended the perpetrator. Hostage safe.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrived but there was no fire. Police later resolved the situation.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrived but no injuries. Police backup was delayed.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control was sent, but it was a hostage situation. Police had to be called again, causing delay.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as book club inquiry. Hostage situation escalated, victim injured.

title: The Wrong Number
description: A caller repeatedly calls and hangs up, but background sounds indicate a break-in. The caller may be hiding and using the call to signal for help.

states.initial: Caller calls and hangs up immediately, no verbal response.
states.whispering: Caller whispers briefly, then hangs up.
states.background: Caller stays on line, sounds of struggle or intruder in background.
states.resolved: Caller is safe or intruder leaves.

initial_variations: [Click] ... [Dial tone]
Hello? [Silence] [Click]
[Static] [Muffled] ... [Dial tone]
Sorry, wrong number. [Click]

resolved: They left. Police can come now.
My name is {caller_name}. I'm safe now.

whispering: Maybe a knife... saw something shiny...
resolved: No weapon seen. They just stole things.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived and arrested the burglars. Residents safe.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrived but no fire. Police had to be dispatched separately.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treated minor injuries from the break-in.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control sent to the wrong scene. Burglars escaped.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as prank. Residents were attacked and severely injured.

title: The Pet Grooming Appointment
description: A caller pretends to schedule a pet grooming appointment, but uses code to report an abusive partner present. Sounds of a dog barking in background.

states.initial: Caller is speaking openly about grooming, but with coded phrases.
states.coded: Caller uses specific code words to indicate danger.
states.confronted: Abuser confronts caller, caller tries to maintain cover.

initial_variations: Hi, I need to book a grooming appointment for my {specific_details} at {address_location}. Can you fit us in?
Yes, I'm calling about the grooming. My {victim_relation} recommended you. The dog has a {ambient_audio} issue.
I'd like to schedule a wash and clip for my pet. We're at {address_location}. The dog is very {specific_details} today.
Hello, this is about the appointment for {caller_name}'s dog. The address is {address_location}. There's a lot of {ambient_audio} here.

initial: We're at {address_location}. The dog needs urgent care.
The address is {address_location}. Can you send someone quickly?
coded: Same location: {address_location}. The {specific_details} problem is escalating.
confronted: I said {address_location}! Please just send the groomer!
I'm at {address_location} with the {specific_details} dog. Just come!
safe: Thanks for the appointment. We're at {address_location}. The issue is resolved.

initial: The dog is {specific_details} because of the {ambient_audio}. We need a gentle handler.
My {victim_relation} said to ask for a {specific_details} package. There's also a {ambient_audio} problem.
The condition is {specific_details} and the environment is {ambient_audio}. It's a tough situation.
coded: The dog isn't the issue. There's a {specific_details} person here. {victim_relation} is in danger.
It's not about the dog. The {ambient_audio} is from a struggle. Please send police.
confronted: He's right here. I can't talk. The dog is fine, but the {specific_details} is out of control!
I'm being watched. Just send help. The {ambient_audio} is from him.
safe: He left. The dog is fine. But {victim_relation} needs assistance. Can you send police quietly?

initial: I'm {caller_name}. The owner of the dog.
This is {caller_name}. I'm calling for the pet.
confronted: I'm {caller_name}. Just send the police, please.
Call me {caller_name}. I can't say more.
safe: I'm {caller_name}. Thank you for understanding.

initial: {victim_relation} is the one who recommended your grooming.
I'm concerned about {victim_relation}. They seem upset.
Check on {victim_relation}. They are with the dog.
coded: {victim_relation} is being hurt. The {ambient_audio} is from them.
{victim_relation} needs immediate help. The dog is just a cover.
confronted: He's hurting {victim_relation} now! Please!
{victim_relation} is the real victim. Hurry!
safe: {victim_relation} is free. They have bruises.

initial: No weapons, just the dog's {specific_details} behavior.
The dog is the only weapon here, ha ha.
Nothing like that. Just grooming tools.
coded: He has a knife. I saw it in the kitchen.
I think there's a gun in the house. Be careful.
confronted: He's holding a {specific_details} to her throat!
Weapon! ! He has a weapon!
safe: No weapon found. He didn't have one.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police responded and arrested the abusive partner. Victim safe.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire crew arrived but no fire. Police had to handle the situation.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treated the victim's injuries. Police made arrest later.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control handled the dog, but the domestic issue was missed. Police called separately.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as pet grooming. Victim suffered severe injuries.

title: The Tech Support Call
description: A caller pretends to have computer issues but is actually reporting a cyber stalker who broke into their home. Background sounds of keyboard typing and muffled speech.

states.initial: Caller is describing fake tech problems with coded warnings.
states.code_active: Caller uses specific phrases to indicate intruder presence.
states.intruder_interaction: Intruder comes near, caller must keep up act.

initial_variations: Hello, my computer is having a {specific_details} issue. I'm at {address_location}. The screen keeps {ambient_audio}.
I need tech support for a {specific_details} error. It started when {victim_relation} visited. Can you help quickly?
My device is acting {ambient_audio}. I think it's a {specific_details} virus. Please send a technician to {address_location}.
Yes, I'm calling about the {specific_details} problem. The {ambient_audio} is really distracting. Address is {address_location}.

initial: I'm at {address_location}. The {specific_details} is happening on the main computer.
Location is {address_location}. The {ambient_audio} is coming from the server room.
Address: {address_location}. Please send a tech soon.
code_active: Same: {address_location}. The {specific_details} is a person. Hurry.
At {address_location}. The intruder is in the {ambient_audio} area.
intruder_interaction: Yes, I'm at {address_location}. The {specific_details} needs urgent attention. (To intruder: 'Just a second, tech support.')
It's {address_location}. I can't talk in detail. Please send police.
safe: Location: {address_location}. The issue is resolved. Send police for evidence.

initial: The computer shows a {specific_details} after {victim_relation} was here. Also there's {ambient_audio}.
It's a {specific_details} error. The {ambient_audio} indicates a hardware problem.
I think it's a {specific_details} from a {victim_relation}. The {ambient_audio} is annoying.
code_active: It's not a computer problem. There's an intruder named {victim_relation}. He's using the computer.
The {ambient_audio} is him typing. He broke in through the {specific_details} window. Send police.
intruder_interaction: He's right here. I'm pretending to fix a {specific_details}. He's suspicious. Help!
The {specific_details} is a ruse. He has a weapon. Police now!
safe: He's gone. He stole some data. But we're safe. Police can come.

intruder_interaction: I'm {caller_name}. Just do what I say on the phone.
safe: I'm {caller_name}. Thank you for your patience.

initial: {victim_relation} was here earlier. They might have caused the {specific_details}.
code_active: The victim is me! He's threatening me.
intruder_interaction: I'm the victim. {victim_relation} is the perp.
safe: I'm the victim. Arrest {victim_relation}.

initial: No weapons, just a computer virus.
The only weapon is the {ambient_audio} sound.
code_active: He has a knife. I saw it on his belt.
intruder_interaction: He's holding a {specific_details} to my back. I think it's a gun.
He has a weapon. I can see it in his hand.
safe: He was armed. He dropped it when he ran.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived and arrested the intruder. Caller safe.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters responded but no fire. Police had to be called again.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treated caller for minor injuries. Intruder fled.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control sent to location. Intruder escaped and caller was assaulted.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as tech support. Intruder stole sensitive data and harmed caller.

title: The Late Delivery Complaint
description: A caller complains about a late pizza delivery, but is actually reporting a home invasion in progress. Background sounds of struggle and smashing.

states.initial: Caller pretends to be angry about a pizza delivery.
states.escalating: Intruder becomes more aggressive, caller's voice shakes.
states.desperate: Caller's cover is nearly blown, pleads for help.

initial_variations: I ordered a pizza over an hour ago! It's for {caller_name} at {address_location}. This is unacceptable!
Where is my delivery? I've been waiting for {specific_details} minutes. The {ambient_audio} is driving me crazy!
I'm calling about a late pizza. I'm at {address_location}. I have {victim_relation} here and we're starving!
Hello, I want to speak to the manager. My pizza hasn't arrived. There's a lot of {ambient_audio} going on here.

initial: I already told you: {address_location}! Now where's my pizza?
It's {address_location}. The delivery driver should know this.
escalating: Same place, {address_location}! I need that pizza now! (Sounds of struggle) ... Did you hear that?
It's {address_location}. Please, the {ambient_audio} is getting worse. Just send someone.
desperate: I'm at {address_location}! Forget the pizza, just send police! (To intruder: 'Don't hurt them!')
resolved: Thanks for the pizza. Actually, police are here. It's over at {address_location}.

initial: I ordered a large pepperoni. The order number is {specific_details}. The {ambient_audio} is from my TV.
It's been {specific_details} minutes! The {ambient_audio} is from the neighbor's party.
I want a refund. The {ambient_audio} is making this worse.
escalating: It's not about the pizza. There are people in my house. They are {ambient_audio} and threatening {victim_relation}.
Forget the pizza. I'm being robbed. They have {specific_details} intruders. Please send police.
desperate: They're hurting {victim_relation}! I can't pretend anymore! Send police to {address_location}!
There are {specific_details} men with weapons! They're ransacking the house! Help!
resolved: The intruders fled when police arrived. {victim_relation} is safe. Thank you.

initial: This is {caller_name}. I placed the order.
I'm {caller_name}. I've been waiting for ages.
escalating: I'm {caller_name}. Just send the police, please.
It's {caller_name}. I'm in danger.
resolved: This is {caller_name}. Everything is under control.

initial: {victim_relation} is here with me. We're both hungry.
{victim_relation} told me to call for the pizza.
escalating: {victim_relation} is being threatened. They're in the other room.
They have {victim_relation} at knifepoint. Please!
desperate: They're hurting {victim_relation}! I can hear them crying!
resolved: {victim_relation} is safe. The intruders are arrested.

initial: Weapon? I don't have any. Just a pizza cutter.
No weapons here. Just the delivery driver issue.
The only weapon is my frustration.
escalating: One of them has a knife. I saw it.
I think they have guns. They're shouting about money.
desperate: They have guns! And they're pointing at {victim_relation}!
I saw a shotgun. Please hurry!
resolved: They were armed. Police confiscated weapons.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police responded to the home invasion. Intruders arrested. Residents safe.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrived but no fire. Police had to be dispatched to handle the invasion.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treated the victims for minor injuries. Police made arrests.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control sent to the scene. Intruders escaped, victims traumatized.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as a pizza complaint. Home invasion escalated, victims killed.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived and found a burglar trying to break in. The caller was rescued safely.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department forced the door, but the burglar escaped. The caller was safe but resources wasted.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics treated the caller for anxiety, but the police never came; the burglar got away.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrived, thinking it was an animal stuck. The burglar fled, but the caller was locked for hours.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as a minor lockout. The caller was found dead from an intruder.

title: Gas Leak or Cover-Up?
description: A caller reports a gas leak, but background sounds suggest a domestic dispute. The dispatcher must determine if it's a real emergency or a code call.

initial: Caller says there is a gas leak at {address_location}.
hiding: Caller whispers that the gas leak is a cover for an intruder.
confronting: Sounds of a physical altercation escalate.
secured: Police arrive and the situation is under control.

initial_variations: There's a gas leak at {address_location}! I smell {specific_details}. Please send help!
I'm {caller_name}, reporting a strong gas odor at {address_location}. I also hear {ambient_audio}.
Emergency! Gas leak! {address_location}. But there's something else, {ambient_audio}.

initial: {address_location}, the kitchen. The smell is strong.
hiding: {address_location}, I'm in the basement. He's upstairs.

initial: The smell is like rotten eggs. There's a {specific_details} near the stove.
I think the pilot light went out. But there's a {specific_details} in the room.
hiding: The gas leak is fake. He's using it to get me out. He has a {specific_details}.
{caller_name}, but don't say my name.
My {victim_relation} is the one threatening me.

initial: I hear {ambient_audio}. Maybe it's the gas.
hiding: {ambient_audio} from upstairs. He's pacing.

initial: I'll open a window. Please send police, not gas company.
I'll pretend to evacuate. Send unmarked cars.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived and arrested the abusive partner. The gas leak was a ruse to get help.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department responded, found no gas leak. The domestic violence escalated before police arrived.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics treated minor injuries, but the abuser fled. Police were needed but not called.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrived, causing confusion. The victim was severely beaten.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as a false alarm. The victim was found hospitalized with serious injuries.

title: The Laundry Service Call
description: A caller pretends to schedule a laundry pickup, but is actually reporting a domestic violence situation using coded phrases.

states.initial: Caller is on the line, speaking in a forced cheerful tone about laundry pickup.
states.hiding: Caller has moved to a closet or bathroom, whispering.
states.confronting: The abuser is present and threatening, caller tries to maintain facade.
states.secured: Police have arrived and the caller is safe.

initial_variations: Hi, I'd like to schedule a laundry pickup for {caller_name} at {address_location}. The service code is {specific_details}.
Hello, I'm calling about the laundry. Can you send someone to pick up the {specific_details} from {caller_name} at {address_location}?
This is {caller_name}. I need a laundry pickup at {address_location}. The bags are tagged with {specific_details} and there's a {ambient_audio} sound in the background.

initial: I'm at {address_location}. Please send a pickup.
hiding: I'm at {address_location}, hiding in the closet.
Same address: {address_location}. He's looking for me.
Please send help to {address_location}. I'm in the bathroom.
secured: Thank you. I'm at {address_location}, safe now.

hiding: {specific_details}. That's the code. He's in the next room.
Please, {specific_details} means danger. Hurry.
Remember {specific_details}. I can't say more.
confronting: {specific_details} is what I need. Just do it!
secured: {specific_details} was the signal. You saved me.

initial: Isn't it clear? I need laundry service.
What part of 'pickup' don't you understand?
Are you new? I need a pickup.
hiding: I'm trying to tell you! Please just send help!
Can't you hear the {ambient_audio}? I'm not talking about laundry!
Forget laundry! Send police!
confronting: I can't explain. Just do your job!
Please, just agree and send someone.
secured: I was so scared. He's gone now.

hiding: (whisper) I'm in the closet. He's leaving.
(silence) ...
(crying quietly)
secured: (relieved sigh) He's handcuffed. Thank you.

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrived and arrested the abuser. Caller is safe.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters were confused. The situation was a domestic dispute, not a fire.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: EMS arrived but no injuries. They called police to handle the domestic situation.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control showed up, causing confusion and endangering the caller. Abuser escalated.

DISMISS.feedback: Call dismissed. Caller was assaulted severely before police could respond.

title: The Wrong Apartment Call
description: A caller pretends to have dialed the wrong number but is actually held captive and using a code to signal for help.

states.initial: Caller speaks nervously, claiming to have the wrong apartment.
states.hiding: Caller is whispering from a bathroom or closet.
states.confronting: The captor is nearby, caller tries to sound normal.
states.rescued: Police have entered and caller is safe.

initial_variations: Hi, I think I have the wrong apartment. Is this {address_location}? I was looking for {specific_details}.
Sorry to bother, I dialed {specific_details} by mistake. Is this {address_location}?
Hello? I'm trying to reach {caller_name} at {address_location}. I have a {specific_details} delivery.

hiding: Same place, {address_location}. I'm hiding.
Please send to {address_location}. Hurry.
I'm at {address_location}, locked in a room.
confronting: I told you, {address_location}! Just confirm the delivery!
You know the address: {address_location}. Don't make them suspicious.
rescued: Thank you. I'm at {address_location}, safe now.

initial: Yes, it's a {specific_details} delivery. Please hurry.
hiding: {specific_details} is the code! He's holding me.
Please, {specific_details} means emergency. Send police.
Don't you understand? {specific_details} is a signal.
confronting: {specific_details} is what I ordered. Just confirm.
I said {specific_details}. That's what I need.

initial: I just want to know if this is the right number.
I'm trying to deliver a package. Is this {address_location}?
Do you want the delivery or not?
hiding: I need help! This isn't about delivery!
Can't you hear {ambient_audio}? Send police!
Please, I'm being held against my will!
confronting: I can't talk. Just send the delivery.
Please, just go along with it.
rescued: You saved me. I was so afraid.

hiding: (whisper) He's asleep.
(silence) ...
(quiet crying)

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters arrived but couldn't enter without police. Delayed rescue.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: EMS treated minor injuries after police secured scene.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control arrived and the captor became violent. Caller injured.

DISMISS.feedback: Call dismissed. Caller was later found deceased.

states.confronted: The abuser enters the room, caller becomes tense.

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrive and find a domestic violence situation in progress. They intervene and arrest the abuser. The victims are safe.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters arrive to find no fire. They report suspicious activity, but police are needed instead. Slight delay.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Medics arrive and treat minor injuries from the domestic violence. Police are still needed. Helpful but not primary.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control arrives and finds no animals. They call police backup, causing confusion and delay.

DISMISS.feedback: You dismiss the call as a wrong number. The domestic violence continues and later escalates to a homicide. You are investigated for negligence.

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police surround the house and negotiate. The hostages are freed and the perpetrators arrested. You saved lives.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters arrive and find no fire. They alert police, but valuable time is lost.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Medics arrive and treat minor injuries after police resolve the situation. Not the primary need.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control arrives and is met by armed suspects. They retreat and call police, but the situation escalates due to delay.

DISMISS.feedback: You dismiss the call as a party planning query. The hostage situation turns violent; multiple casualties. You are fired and face charges.

name: The Silent Caller
description: The line is open, but the caller says nothing. Heavy breathing, muffled sounds, and faint knocking are heard. The caller may be unable to speak due to threat or injury.

states.initial: Caller is silent on the line, only breathing.
states.rescued: Police arrive and help the victim.

initial_variations: [Heavy breathing] ... [Long pause] ... [Muffled sound]
[Silence] ... [Click] ... [Breathing] ... [Faint tapping]
[Sniffling] ... [Quiet crying] ... [Door creaks]

whispering: [Whispered] He has a knife. I'm hiding.
responses.rescued: [Shaking] He broke in. I'm safe now.

responses.panicked: [Panicked] There's someone else! I don't know!

whispering: [Whispered] Yes, it's an emergency. Please send police.

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police trace the call and arrive to find a burglary in progress. They apprehend the suspect and rescue the victim. Excellent work.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters arrive and find no fire, but notice signs of disturbance. They call police. Minor delay.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Medics arrive and find a frightened victim. They provide comfort and police are called. Victim is safe.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control arrives and disrupts the burglary. The suspect escapes, and the victim is injured. Your decision costs time and safety.

DISMISS.feedback: You dismiss the silent call as a wrong number. The victim is later found dead. You are terminated and face disciplinary action.
